title: Immersive TECH Pack
description: A lightweight and immersive tech modpack.
body:
## A lightweight tech modpack focused on server performance and immersive gameplay.

Features:
- Explore the world with custom buildings and biomes
- Make production lines and automate with tech mods like mekanism, create and ender IO
- Go to space!
- Create a digital store system with AE2
- Enjoy the world with immersive audio, distant horizons and compatible shaders
- Play with your friends with the in-game voice chat
- And more...

_**Designed for a private server**_
